tc_03_Null value validation.Null_cnt: select count(pid) from cost_dim where pid is null or price is null or sales is null
tc_03_Null value validation.C: select pid from cost_dim where pid is null or price is null or sales is null

tc_04_Verification of duplicate records.duplicate_cnt: select count(pid) from cost_dim group by pid having count(pid)>1
tc_04_Verification of duplicate records.duplicate_rcd: select pid, count(pid) from cost_dim group by pid having count(pid)>1

tc_05_Verification of source & Target co.s_table: select pid, round(price) as price, sales_date from cost
